creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As David Muir Sharnoff wrote:

> >Synopsis:       newfs man page refers to format(8)

> 	There is no format(8).

It should IMO refer to fdformat(1) and scsiformat(8) (the latter to
come RSN).  There's no such thing like wdformat(8) available...

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
